questions.body: If set of marbles, of radius 5 cm, is poured into a cube of side 1 m. The maximum number of marbles that can be filled into the box are
questions.subject: maths
questions.solution: Number of marbles in one layer = 10 × 10 = 100, Number of marbles in box = Number of layer × Number of marbles in one layer = 10 × 100 = 1000

questions.body: A round table cover has six equal designs as shown in the adjacent figure. If the radius of the cover is 4 cm, then cost of making the designs at the rate of Rs 10.00 per cm² (round off your answer to a nearest rupee) is
questions.subject: maths
questions.skip_reason: Cannot solve without seeing the geometric design in the figure
questions.solution: Cost = Shaded area × cost rate = (area of circle - area of hexagon) × cost rate = [π(10)² - 6 × (√3/4)(10)²] × 10 = 86.70 Rs. = 87 Rs. (Roundoff)

Consider the following two statements.
Statement-1 : The direction of acceleration of a particle must be always same as that of velocity.

questions.body: If the distance between A and B is 230 km, B and C is 120 km, C and A is 350 km. Also, if the distance between C and D is 200 km, distance between D and B is 330 km and distance from A to E is 130 km and distance between D and E is 570 km. The diagram (not drawn to scale) that represents this graphically is:

choices.b: Rectangle E-D at top, A-B-C at bottom
choices.d: Pentagon E-D at top, A-B-C at bottom

questions.subject: maths
questions.solution:
(a) AB + BC = AC, 230 + 120 = 350, A, B, C are collinear
(b), (d) BD > BC + CD, 330 > 120 + 200, No triangle can be formed
(c) BD ≠ BC + CD, 330 ≠ 120 + 200, B, C, D are not collinear

questions.body: The solution set of the inequality 0 < x/(x+1) < 1, x ∈ R is

choices.a: Set of all positive real numbers
choices.b: set of all real numbers except - 1
choices.c: set of all non-negative real numbers
choices.d: set of all numbers satisfying 0 ≤ x ≤ 1, x ∈ R

questions.subject: maths
questions.solution: x/(x+1) > 0 and x/(x+1) < 1, x/(x+1) - 1 < 0, (x - x - 1)/(x+1) < 0, -1/(x+1) < 0, 1/(x+1) > 0, x + 1 > 0, x > 0 or x < -1, x > -1, so final answer is, x > 0, i.e. set of all positive real number.
